description_long: This is a round loaf of bread with a golden-brown crust and a slightly domed top. The surface features a few shallow, curved score marks radiating from the center, giving it a rustic, artisan appearance. The crust appears smooth with a subtle sheen, and there are no visible seeds or flour dusting. The loaf is unsliced and has a uniform, compact shape, typical of traditional European country bread. The coloration transitions from a deeper brown on top to a lighter, creamier hue near the base. Its size and finish suggest it is freshly baked and suitable for display or sale in an urban bakery or market.
description: A round, golden-brown artisan bread loaf with shallow curved scoring and a smooth, slightly glossy crust.
description_view_0: This view highlights the top scoring pattern and the even, golden-brown coloration of the crust.
description_view_1: This angle shows a smoother side with less visible scoring and a lighter area near the base.
description_view_2: The loaf appears more domed from this side, with minimal scoring and a glossy surface.
description_view_3: This view again emphasizes the top scoring and the transition from brown to lighter tones at the base.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust features a few shallow, curved score marks radiating from the center, with a smooth, slightly glossy finish and no visible seeds or flour dusting.
